title: Bouncing Putty Assorted Sensory toys - 12 Pack Putty Fidgety Toys
features: Contains 12 pieces of Fidget Sensory Bouncing Putty in one compact unit
Ideal for gift bags or party games
Individual Dimensions: Height 5.7cm x Width 7cm x Depth 7cm
CDU Dimensions: Height 12cm x Width 15cm x Depth 22.5cm
description: Discover Bouncing Putty, a captivating blend of creativity and fun, ideal for kids and adults alike! Picture the delight on your child's face as they explore the stretchy, bouncy magic of Bouncing Putty. Each CDU contains 12 units, showcasing six vibrant colors. Mix and match to create your own unique shades and designs! The possibilities are endless – stretch it, mold it, bounce it! Bouncing Putty is perfect for imaginative play, stress relief, or simply passing the time in an enjoyable way. Whether you're a child exploring creativity or an adult seeking a fun way to relax, Bouncing Putty is sure to bring joy. It's safe, non-toxic, and designed for everyone's enjoyment. Looking for the perfect party favor or stocking stuffer? With 12 units per CDU, Bouncing Putty is an excellent choice for birthdays, holidays, or any special occasion. Kids will love collecting all the colors and sharing the fun with friends!
